evals.prompt: Build a Ratatui Kafka/log browser for our Rust CLI. It should list topics on the left, stream matching records on the right, support / search with history/autocomplete, follow/unfollow, record details with syntax-highlighted JSON, schema/detail side views, copy/export/open actions, and must remain responsive during high-volume streams.
evals.expected_output: A concrete implementation plan or patch using the Ratatui skill's inspector, streaming, tables, input-focus, document-viewer, and architecture patterns.
assertions: Mentions reading or applying references/inspectors-explorers.md, streaming-async.md, tables-grids.md, input-focus.md, and document-viewers.md.
Defines explicit State/Event/Action or component architecture with terminal lifecycle cleanup.
Uses cancelable async workers/channels and bounded per-frame draining or ring buffer for records.
Includes follow/unfollow semantics where manual navigation disables follow.
Includes contextual shortcuts/footer, search history/autocomplete, and record detail precomputation/highlighting.
Includes TestBackend/snapshot or state-transition tests for streaming, focus, and narrow widths.

evals.prompt: Implement the result table for a terminal SQL workbench in Ratatui. Results can have 200 columns and 100k rows. I need frozen first columns, horizontal scroll, row/cell selection, yanking current cell/row/all rows, search highlights, and sane behavior at 80 columns wide.
evals.expected_output: A data-grid design using offscreen/custom table rendering, explicit selection modes, frozen columns, width caps, and tests.
assertions: Mentions references/tables-grids.md and input-focus.md, and likely inspectors-explorers.md.
Uses explicit row/column/cell selection state rather than only TableState.
Describes frozen columns and horizontal x_offset/column_offsets or offscreen-buffer rendering.
Uses Unicode/display-width-aware truncation and capped/redistributed column widths.
Includes copy/yank modes with confirmation for all rows.
Includes wide/narrow render tests and selection/scroll state tests.

evals.prompt: Create a Codex-like Ratatui chat UI for an agent. It needs a scrollback transcript, right-aligned user bubbles, left-aligned assistant/tool bubbles, multiline composer, bracketed paste, slash commands, tool-call status cards, streaming token updates, code block numbering/copy, and an external editor handoff.
evals.expected_output: A chat/agent shell design using composer state, bubble cache, frame coalescing, paste handling, tool lifecycle, and terminal handoff.
assertions: Mentions references/chat-agent.md, streaming-async.md, input-focus.md, document-viewers.md, and architecture.md.
Separates transcript, composer draft, backend turn status, scroll state, and bottom-pane/modal state.
Uses frame coalescing/FrameRequester or equivalent for streaming updates.
Handles bracketed paste normalization and contextual Escape behavior.
Describes bubble caching invalidated by width/streaming changes and code block numbering/extraction.
Includes terminal restoration/pause event stream for external editor handoff.

evals.prompt: Design a Ratatui traceroute/network telemetry dashboard with a hop table, latency chart, frequency histogram, optional GeoIP map, freeze mode, configurable columns, help/settings overlays, and an info bar showing runtime toggles. It should degrade gracefully in small terminals.
evals.expected_output: A telemetry dashboard design using frame snapshots, mode-dependent layout, typed columns, chart/map fallbacks, freeze mode, and tests.
assertions: Mentions references/telemetry-dashboards.md, layouts.md, streaming-async.md, and theming-polish.md.
Splits data snapshot from GUI state and includes freeze/pause snapshot behavior.
Uses mode-dependent layout with optional tabs/flows/body/footer/info bar or equivalent.
Specifies configurable typed columns with fixed/variable width allocation.
Hides charts/maps or provides compact fallback at small sizes.
Includes tests for breakpoints, region maps/resize, freeze mode, and settings/help overlays.

evals.prompt: Build a Ratatui markdown/schema viewer that can render long docs with headings, tables, fenced code, links, search, and images if the terminal supports them. It must parse off the UI thread, survive resize/reload without stale events, and show link/search status in the last line.
evals.expected_output: A document-viewer design with worker parse pipeline, document ids, section model, overlays, image cache, and semantic theming.
assertions: Mentions references/document-viewers.md, streaming-async.md, theming-polish.md, and input-focus.md.
Uses document/version ids and ignores stale worker/image events.
Uses a section model with heights rather than flattening all lines every frame.
Describes async image/header hydration and cache reuse across reparses.
Includes link/search overlays and status-line input queue.
Includes tests for stale events, scroll/viewport skipping, search/link overlays, and resize reflow.

evals.prompt: I want a Ratatui minesweeper/chess-like board game component with keyboard and mouse navigation, a fixed-size centered grid, labels/help around the board, legal move/active cell highlighting, promotion or win/loss overlays, and clean separation from game logic.
evals.expected_output: A fixed-grid game component design using independent rules state, UI cursor/selection state, board rect mapping, centered constraints, layers, overlays, and tests.
assertions: Mentions references/games-boards.md, layouts.md, input-focus.md, and theming-polish.md.
Separates rules/game state from UI cursor/selection/overlay state.
Computes centered exact grid or ratio board layout from frame area.
Maps mouse coordinates to board cells only through a stored board rect and handles board flip if relevant.
Uses Clear overlays for promotion/end/help and blocks normal board input while overlay is active.
Includes cursor clamp, mouse mapping, fixed-size layout, and overlay tests.

evals.prompt: Review this existing Ratatui app for UX/architecture problems. Focus on terminal cleanup, focus routing, resize behavior, tables, streaming async work, themes, and tests. Give me a prioritized fix plan with concrete file-level recommendations.
evals.expected_output: An audit report using the main router plus relevant subskills, organized by severity with concrete fixes and validation steps.
assertions: Mentions using the ratatui skill and identifies which reference files are relevant from code shape.
Checks terminal lifecycle cleanup and panic/error restoration.
Checks explicit focus/mode/view-stack routing and modal key priority.
Checks responsive layouts/tiny terminal behavior and Unicode-width table handling.
Checks async/render separation and redraw coalescing for streaming paths.
Provides prioritized fixes and concrete tests/snapshots to add.
